title: The lady Of Shalott by Alfred Tennyson Line by Line Explanation Part 2  British Lit. 19 cent
description: Hello friends in this video you will be getting the explanation of Alfred Lord Tennyson's " The lady of Shalott " and in this video, I have tried my best to provide you a summary as well as line by line explanation of all the stanzas of part 1 of the poem #theladyofshalott and besides it, all the difficult word meanings and their significance and the hidden meanings of the words have also been discussed in the video and along with it, background contexts have also been discussed. The video is actually in Hindi so definitely you are not going to face any kind of problem still if you face any problem you are welcome to comment in the comment box.
